name: Soft Scrambled Eggs with Lobster
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Red Bell Pepper, stemmed, seeded, and minced
12 ounces Lobster Meat, freshly cooked and torn into 1/2-inch chunks
9 large eggs, beaten until just blended
5 tablespoons Heavy Cream or Whipping Cream
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add the bell pepper and sauté for 2 minutes. Add the lobster and cook for a few minutes, just until warmed through. Stir in the chives, cook for an additional 30 seconds, and remove from heat.
2. In a medium heavy skillet, melt another 2 tablespoons of butter over low heat. Swirl in the eggs and half the cream. Gently scramble the eggs, stirring with a rubber spatula until thickened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the remaining cream and 2 tablespoons of butter to the eggs and continue stirring until the mixture is very thick and creamy. Season with salt and pepper. Quickly fold in the warmed lobster mixture just until evenly distributed. Spoon the scrambled eggs onto 4 warmed plates and serve immediately with your favorite toast or bagels. Makes 4 servings.
